test_runner.label: Test runner
test_runner.description: Test framework to use. 'auto' detects from project files (Cargo.toml, package.json, etc).

commit_at_green.label: Commit at green
commit_at_green.description: Whether to commit automatically after each test passes.

test_style.label: Test style
test_style.description: unit: isolated, no I/O, fast. integration: crosses real boundaries (DB, filesystem, network). e2e: full user flow through real endpoints.

phase.label: Active phase
phase.description: all: full TDD loop (default). Set to a specific phase to constrain an agent to only that phase — useful for specialist agents that must not cross phase boundaries.
